ContactPage.Title: Contact us
ContactPage.Description: If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us.

AboutPage.Title: About us
AboutPage.Description: Meet the team behind Bondery and learn why we built it.
AboutPage.PeopleSubtitle: We are building tools that help people nurture meaningful relationships with intention.
AboutPage.HeroTitle: We are building a better way to stay close to people who matter.
AboutPage.HeroLead: Bondery helps you keep meaningful relationships active, intentional, and easy to maintain.
AboutPage.Intro: We are the team behind Bondery: We help you build a better personal network.
AboutPage.Story: We created Bondery because we were unsatisfied with current tools to manage our most valuable resource: our networks and bonds. Either they were too focused on sales or we didn't know what was happening to our data.
AboutPage.StoryBody: Bondery started from a simple frustration: relationship tools either felt transactional or made us compromise on privacy and ownership.
AboutPage.MissionBody: We are building a calm, trustworthy relationship workspace that helps people stay in touch with intention over the long term.
AboutPage.PrinciplesIntro: From product design to infrastructure, these principles guide how we build Bondery.
AboutPage.PrinciplePeopleDescription: We design for genuine relationships, not contact volume.
AboutPage.PrincipleTrustDescription: Your data should remain yours and be handled with transparency.
AboutPage.PrincipleConsistencyDescription: Consistent, lightweight follow-ups create stronger long-term bonds.
AboutPage.FoundersPhotoAlt: Marek and Martin at a hackathon
AboutPage.ContactTeamTitle: Who will reply to your question?
AboutPage.CommunityDescription: Join the community and follow our journey.

SingleContactPage.Description: View and manage details of your contact.

LinkedInImport.CardDescription: Import contacts from your LinkedIn data export
LinkedInImport.IntroDescription1: You can upload connections from your LinkedIn data export.
LinkedInImport.IntroDescription2: After upload, we check which contacts already exist. If they do not exist, you can choose to add them.
LinkedInImport.IntroDescription3: ZIP files are only used for parsing and are not stored on our server.
LinkedInImport.InstructionStep1LinkLabel: Download my data in LinkedIn settings
LinkedInImport.InstructionStep3: Wait for the email that your data is ready
LinkedInImport.FilesAlertDescriptionPrefix: After downloading the ZIP, we recommend deleting all files except
LinkedInImport.FilesAlertDescriptionSuffix: This helps keep the file small and parsing fast.
LinkedInImport.DropzoneDescription: We will locate Connections.csv and prepare contacts for import.
LinkedInImport.InvalidRowsHint: Some rows are invalid and can be deselected before import.
LinkedInImport.ExistingHandleTooltip: Person with same username already exists
LinkedInImport.ChooseContactsHint: Choose which contacts you want to import
LinkedInImport.NoContactsSelected: Select at least one contact to import.
LinkedInImport.InvalidFile: Invalid file. Upload a LinkedIn ZIP export or folder containing Connections.csv.

InstagramImport.CardDescription: Import contacts from your Instagram data export
InstagramImport.IntroDescription1: You can upload followers and following from your Instagram data export.
InstagramImport.IntroDescription2: After upload, we check which contacts already exist. If they do not exist, you can choose to add them.
InstagramImport.IntroDescription3: ZIP files are only used for parsing and are not stored on our server.
InstagramImport.InstructionStep11: You will receive your information copy in your email when it is ready
InstagramImport.FilesAlertDescriptionPrefix: After downloading the ZIP, we recommend deleting all files except
InstagramImport.FilesAlertDescriptionSuffix: This helps keep the uploaded file small and parsing fast.
InstagramImport.DropzoneDescription: We will validate the data, and prepare contacts for import.
InstagramImport.StrategyHelpDescription: Import strategy decides which Instagram relationship lists will be used to import contacts. For example, if you choose 'Only followers', only people who follow you on Instagram will be offered to import in the next step as contacts.
InstagramImport.InvalidRowsHint: Some rows are invalid and can be deselected before import.
InstagramImport.ExistingHandleTooltip: Person with same username already exists
InstagramImport.NoContactsSelected: Select at least one contact to import.
InstagramImport.InvalidFile: Invalid file. Upload exactly one Instagram ZIP export file.
InstagramImport.ChooseContactsHint: Choose which contacts you want to import

VCardImport.CardDescription: Import contacts from a vCard (.vcf) file
VCardImport.IntroDescription1: You can upload contacts exported from your phone as a .vcf (vCard) file.
VCardImport.IntroDescription2: After upload, we parse all contacts and let you choose which ones to import.
VCardImport.IntroDescription3: Uploaded files are only used for parsing and are not stored on our server.
VCardImport.InstructionStep1: On iPhone: Open Contacts app, select contacts, tap Share and choose "Export vCard"
VCardImport.InstructionStep2: On Android: Open Contacts app, go to Settings/Export and save as .vcf file
VCardImport.InstructionStep3: Transfer the .vcf file to your computer (e.g. via email, cloud storage, phone sharing...)
VCardImport.InstructionStep4: Upload the .vcf file in the next step
VCardImport.DropzoneDescription: We will parse all contacts and prepare them for import.
VCardImport.ChooseContactsHint: Choose which contacts you want to import
VCardImport.NoContactsSelected: Select at least one contact to import.

ApiKeys.Title: API keys
ApiKeys.Description: Connect third-party tools, custom scripts, and other tools to your contacts.
ApiKeys.EmptyDescription: Create a key to connect external tools to your Bondery data.
ApiKeys.DocsHelpLabel: Learn more about API usage and API keys in our docs.
ApiKeys.LimitReached: You have reached the maximum number of API keys. Delete an unused key to create a new one.
ApiKeys.DeleteMessage: This key will stop working immediately. Any integration using it will get errors.
ApiKeys.PermissionFullDescription: Read and update contacts, groups, tags, and more
ApiKeys.PermissionReadDescription: List and view data; cannot create or change records
ApiKeys.RevealAlertDescription: For security, we only store a hash of your key. Not even Bondery can recover the original after you close this. This is the only time you can view the full key. Copy it to a secure place before closing.
ApiKeys.LearnMoreApiDocs: Learn more about API usage in our docs
